title: Introducing Personalized Sales Emails for monday.com!
excerpt: Transform the way you conduct sales outreach with our latest app on the monday.com marketplace: Personalized AI Sales Emails! This powerful tool is designed to boost your sales productivity by generating unique, personal…

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Transform the way you conduct sales outreach with our latest app on the monday.com marketplace: Personalized AI Sales Emails! This powerful tool is designed to boost your sales productivity by generating unique, personalized sales emails tailored to each recipient. Powered by advanced AI, this app ensures your emails are engaging and effective, helping you connect with prospects and clients more meaningfully. All generated emails are stored directly in your monday.com board fields as text, ready for seamless distribution via monday.com’s built-in mailing and chat integrations.

Key Features

AI-Powered Personalization: Leverage AI to generate dynamic, personalized sales emails and follow-up messages based on specific criteria like recipient context, reason for contact, and call to action.
Customizable Tone: Adjust the tone of your emails to match your style—whether it’s informal, friendly, or professional, ensuring your message resonates with the recipient.
Efficient Follow-Ups: Utilize previous conversations to craft follow-up emails that feel personalized and relevant, maintaining continuity in your communication.
Seamless Integration: Integrate email generation within your monday.com boards, keeping everything organized and aligned with your existing workflows.

Use Cases

We created Personalized AI Sales Emails to streamline your sales communication, making it easier and faster to connect with your audience. Traditional methods of writing individual emails are time-consuming and can lack the personalized touch that drives engagement. Our app solves this by automating the process, ensuring each email feels tailored to its recipient.

Cold Outreach for New Prospects: Automate the creation of personalized cold emails with AI-generated content that aligns with each prospect’s unique context.
Event or Webinar Invitations: Send tailored invitations to events or webinars, highlighting the specific benefits for each recipient, thereby increasing attendance and engagement.
Post-Purchase Follow-Up and Upsell Opportunities: Generate thank-you emails with personalized upsell offers to strengthen customer loyalty and drive repeat business.
Re-Engaging Dormant Leads: Revitalize cold leads with customized re-engagement emails that reignite their interest in your offerings.
Client Check-Ins: Maintain strong relationships with thoughtful, personalized check-in emails that show you care about your clients’ ongoing success.
Personalized Email Campaigns for Product Launches: Tailor your product launch emails to individual interests, leading to higher engagement and conversion rates.

About us

We are Deview Studios, a proud monday.com partner committed to enhancing your monday.com experience with innovative solutions!

How to Use

Get started with Personalized AI Sales Emails by installing it from the monday.com marketplace. After installation, setting up the email generation process is quick and easy. Simply configure the integration within your board, and start generating personalized emails!

Dependencies

Personalized AI Sales Emails integrates seamlessly with your existing monday.com account, requiring no additional dependencies. It’s compatible across all subscription tiers, making it accessible for all users.
